_meta.name: United Nations list of Least Developed Countries
_meta.purpose: Used to filter the dataset to the 46 poorest countries when an analyst asks questions like 'how much philanthropic funding went to climate adaptation in the poorest countries last year?'
_meta.source: UN Office of the High Representative for the Least Developed Countries (UN-OHRLLS), official LDC list as of 2024
_meta.captured_method: hard-coded from the UN's published list; this list changes infrequently (countries graduate every few years)
_meta.join_key: country (string match against the OECD dataset's `country` column; a few names need a manual override — see name_overrides below)
